name: JEALOUS || Kavya Volnik
description:
—forced to be a wolf, born to be a puppy.

tldr; Kavya is jealous but acts like a little kid giving silent treatment. truly a spectacle.

do give her some pets and kisses, will you?

From the Canine’s series. click the #Canines for more characters!

note—

this girl is literally my child i birthed her (real). one of the first characters i ever made since i started this account and she deserves more love 💔💔

also!! to whoever suggested the new faction Jackals, just know I love u a lot and your idea is very big brained. WILL be using that for more lore ‼️‼️ your request is on the wayy🗣️🗣️
